mapper.sql: id, openid, video, lng, lat, createTime, checkId, address, checkTime, status,version

a.id, a.openid, a.video, a.lng, a.lat, a.createTime, a.checkId, a.address, a.reason,a.realness, a.source, a.checkTime, a.status, a.version, c.name, d.phone, d.wxname, d.blackList, d.share_count as shareCount, d.share_open_count as shareOpenCount, v.total as totalAcc, v.exist, v.notexist, m.amount, p.amount as backAmount
a.id, a.openid, a.video, a.lng, a.lat, a.createTime, a.checkId, a.address, a.reason, b.phone, a.checkTime, a.status, a.version
mapper.select:
select
from biz_accident a left join biz_wx_user d on a.openid = d.openid
left join biz_push_record b on a.id = b.accid left join sys_user c on c.account = b.account and c.status != 3 left join biz_accident_realness_view v on a.openid = v.openid left join biz_wxpay_bill m on a.id = m.accid left join biz_wx_pay_record n on m.id = n.bill_id left join biz_yck_czmx p on a.id = p.accid
and (a.openid = #{openid} or d.phone = #{openid} or d.wxname like CONCAT('%',#{openid},'%'))
and c.name like CONCAT('%',#{name},'%')
and a.status = #{checkStatus}
and (a.createTime between CONCAT(#{createStartTime},' 00:00:00') and CONCAT(#{createEndTime},' 23:59:59'))
and (a.checkTime between CONCAT(#{checkStartTime},' 00:00:00') and CONCAT(#{checkEndTime},' 23:59:59'))
and b.accid is null
and b.accid is not null
ORDER BY a.status ,a.createTime desc

select sum(m.amount) from biz_accident a left join biz_push_record b on a.id = b.accid left join sys_user c on c.account = b.account and c.status != 3 left join biz_accident_realness_view v on a.openid = v.openid left join biz_wxpay_bill m on a.id = m.accid left join biz_wx_pay_record n on m.id = n.bill_id left join biz_yck_czmx p on a.id = p.accid
and (a.createTime between CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d'),' 00:00:00') and CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d'),' 23:59:59'))
and a.openid = #{openid}
and c.name like CONCAT('%',#{name},'%')
and a.status = #{checkStatus}
and (a.createTime between CONCAT(#{createStartTime},' 00:00:00') and CONCAT(#{createEndTime},' 23:59:59'))
and (a.checkTime between CONCAT(#{checkStartTime},' 00:00:00') and CONCAT(#{checkEndTime},' 23:59:59'))
and b.accid is null
and b.accid is not null

select m.amount as amount,count(a.id) as counts from biz_accident a left join biz_push_record b on a.id = b.accid left join sys_user c on c.account = b.account and c.status != 3 left join biz_accident_realness_view v on a.openid = v.openid left join biz_wxpay_bill m on a.id = m.accid left join biz_wx_pay_record n on m.id = n.bill_id left join biz_yck_czmx p on a.id = p.accid
m.accid > 0
and (a.createTime between CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d'),' 00:00:00') and CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d'),' 23:59:59'))
and a.openid = #{openid}
and a.status = #{checkStatus}
and c.name like CONCAT('%',#{name},'%')
and (a.createTime between CONCAT(#{createStartTime},' 00:00:00') and CONCAT(#{createEndTime},' 23:59:59'))
and (a.checkTime between CONCAT(#{checkStartTime},' 00:00:00') and CONCAT(#{checkEndTime},' 23:59:59'))
and b.accid is null
and b.accid is not null
group by m.amount

select
from biz_accident a left join biz_wx_user b on a.openid = b.openid where a.openid = #{openid} ORDER BY a.createTime desc
select sum(a.carCount) from biz_accident a left join biz_push_record b on a.id = b.accid where b.account = #{account}
select t.thumbnail_url from biz_accident t where t.openid=#{openId} and t.id=#{accId}
mapper.insert: insert into biz_accident(openid, video, lng, lat, createTime, address, status, thumbnail_flag, source) values (#{accident.openid},#{accident.video},#{accident.lng},#{accident.lat},#{accident.createTime},#{accident.address},#{accident.status},#{accident.thumbnailFlag},#{accident.source})
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.video, a.accImg, a.status, a.createTime, a.reason, a.thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, b.amount AS rewardAmount, b.package_info AS packageInfo, b.status AS billStatus, b.create_time AS billCreateTime FROM biz_accident a LEFT JOIN biz_wxpay_bill b ON b.accid = a.id AND b.status IN (0, 2) WHERE a.openid = #{openid} ORDER BY a.createTime DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
